F(a,{O,A;e,y},I,b)end return O end,function(a)local I,F=690298+-690297,a[773967-773966]while F do U[F],I=U[F]-(790290+-790289),(-834673-(-834674))+I if U[F]==435511+-435511 then U[F],q[F]=nil,nil end table[I(-304797-(-326032))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
